Motion To Continue Mandatory Settlement Conference And Trial; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Mariell Rahmani
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Text Ruling

To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories By Mariell Rahmani And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of W. Ernest Mooney In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. W. ERNEST MOONEY, Esq. of Law Offices of Ernest Mooney (Tel: 949-296-7557) for plaintiff Kingdom of Sweden;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KINGDOM OF SWEDEN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories By Mariell Rahmani And Request For Sanctions.

Matter not contested. Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with the modification of adding a deadline for the time to respond, as follows:

The court's docket shows that further responses to form interrogatories were served on July 2, 2021-the same date this motion was filed. It is not clear whether these further responses were adequate. The motion is unopposed and is granted. Defendant to respond within 10 days from notice of entry of the court's order.

Sanctions are awarded to Plaintiff in the amount of $1,560.

Plaintiff to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Set For Trial On Jan-18-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
